title: Storage on the Building Site
full_text:
1.2.2.2 Storage on the Building Site
Storage on the Building Site
1) All building materials, appliances and equipment on the building site shall be
stored in such a way as to prevent the deterioration or impairment of their essential
properties.

sentences.text: All building materials, appliances and equipment on the building site shall be stored in such a way as to prevent the deterioration or impairment of their essential properties.
